sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80863" key="penthkostologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντηκοστο-λογέω</orth>, <sense id="n80863.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">collect the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πεντηκοστή</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0492.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philonid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
